EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ISmartTreeLayout

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control the Smart Tree layout.

[Guid("921ECEC3-BAEC-4BA1-8CF9-87B6D39A9C75")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISmartTreeLayout : INetworkDiagramLayout

Properties

AbsoluteUnit

Indicates whether the values set for the spacing parameters are interpreted as absolute units.

bool AbsoluteUnit { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

AlongSpacing

Indicates the spacing between the diagram junctions that display along the tree direction; that is, the spacing between a diagram junction belonging to the (n) hierarchical level and a diagram junction belonging to the (n+1) hierarchical level.

double AlongSpacing { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

BreakPointPosition

Percentage number that indicates the relative position of the break point on the last segment of the diagram edges; that is on the diagram edge segment parallel to the tree direction.

double BreakPointPosition { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Direction

Indicates the direction of the smart tree structure.

esriLayoutTreeDirection Direction { get; set; }

Property Value

esriLayoutTreeDirection

Examples

Sample Snippet

DisjoinedGraphSpacing

Indicates the minimum spacing that separates diagram features belonging to disjoined graphs when the diagram contains such graphs.

double DisjoinedGraphSpacing { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

EdgesType

Indicates if the diagram edges must display either with right angles, curved geometry, or no refinement.

esriLayoutEdgesType EdgesType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriLayoutEdgesType

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsActive 

bool IsActive { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Name 

string Name { get; }

Property Value

string

Offset

Indicates the distance that is used to separate diagram edge segments that are overlapping. This parameter is only used when EdgesType is esriLayoutOrthogonalEdge.

double Offset { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

PerpendicularSpacing

Indicates the spacing between the diagram junctions that display perpendicularly to the tree direction and belong to the same subtree level; that is, spacing between the junctions that belong to the same hierarchical level in the same subtree.

double PerpendicularSpacing { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

PreserveContainers 

bool PreserveContainers { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

PropertySet 

IPropertySet PropertySet { get; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

SubtreeSpacing

Indicates the spacing between two neighbor subtrees; that is, spacing between the junctions that display perpendicularly to the tree direction and that belong to two different subtrees.

double SubtreeSpacing { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

Version 

int Version { get; }

Property Value

int

Methods

GetAttributeSortingForOutEdges(out bool, out string, out string, out string)

Retrieve the sorting method of out edges.

void GetAttributeSortingForOutEdges(out bool mustSortByAttribute, out string Attribute, out string attributeOwner, out string sortingOrder)

mustSortByAttribute bool
Attribute string
attributeOwner string
sortingOrder string

Sample Snippet

SetAttributeSortingForOutEdges(bool, string, string, string)

Specifies the sorting method of out edges.

void SetAttributeSortingForOutEdges(bool mustSortByAttribute, string Attribute, string attributeOwner, string sortingOrder)

mustSortByAttribute bool
Attribute string
attributeOwner string
sortingOrder string
